subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: Yes, prayer might prevent the strong wind from blowing out the light of the lamp--but it could never change the amount of oil in the lamp--that is preordained.
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @free will and predestination; fate, @power of prayer
